title: taraxacum subeburneum
intro: Taraxacum subeburneum is a lesser-known species of dandelion, a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum subeburneum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum subeburneum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
